Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-pages/
Fetched: 2026-03-30

# Microsoft Power Pages documentation

Use Power Pages to create external-facing websites that allow users outside their organizations to sign in with a wide variety of identities, create and view data in Dataverse, or even browse content anonymously.

## Key capabilities listed:
- Getting started: What is Power Pages, capabilities, create and manage sites, security, architecture white papers
- Tutorials: Design home page, set up brand kit, create page with list, create page with form, configure site authentication
- Design and build: Design studio, Pages workspace, Styling workspace, templates, Portal Management app, VS Code and Power Platform CLI
- AI and Copilot: AI-powered overview, AI-generated form using Copilot, AI-generated text using Copilot, enable agent in site, Bing webmaster indexing
- Connect to Dataverse: Data workspace, lists, basic forms, multistep forms, table permissions
- Customize and extend: Liquid, web templates, Portals web API, code components, Power Automate cloud flows integration, advanced configuration
- Security: Authentication, web roles, table permissions
- Go live: Checklist, licensing, ALM
- Administer and monitor: Admin center, diagnostics, maintenance, consumption reports

Page last updated: 2025-06-28
